verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Italy. The specialists provided solid, image-grounded evidence (Alfa Romeo, stucco architecture, Mediterranean vegetation). The tournament successfully used this evidence to distinguish Italy from the closest competitor (Spain).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described stucco buildings and background hills.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly identified the Alfa Romeo and street furniture.
